title: Channel Capability Shared Runtime Smoke
objective: Prove the target OpenClaw runtime package can execute shared message-channel helper behavior before the full runtime baseline and adapter-specific conformance runs.

phases.title: Provision Runtime Env
phases.intent: Create a disposable OpenClaw environment with the selected target runtime so Kova can execute the release-shaped shared channel-message runtime path.

phases.title: OpenClaw Channel Capability Shared Runtime Smoke
phases.intent: Import the selected OpenClaw runtime's packaged channel-message helpers, exercise shared helper behavior with deterministic in-memory adapters, and emit one shared-runtime-smoke proof row per OpenClaw channel capability catalog entry.
evidence: shared runtime smoke capability proof rows
